situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete (all audit-2026-07-02-007 fixes merged). Triggered new full audit per event-driven protocol. Selected personal-assistant as next unaudited project (autonomous-studio-aone, autonomous-studio/prod-deploy, autonomous-engine already audited in history).

audit_findings.finding: API keys stored in plaintext, not gitignored
Wildcard CORS allow_origins=[*] with zero auth
POST /settings/llm accepts api_key+base_url unauthenticated — SSRF vector
audit_findings.remediation: Add auth middleware, restrict base_url changes

audit_findings.finding: Path traversal in POST /inbox/upload — arbitrary file write
DELETE /chat-log no auth — silent PII deletion
connect() runs full DDL every connection

audit_findings.remediation: Implement connection pool or per-request DI

audit_findings.finding: Non-deterministic hash() for IDs breaks dedup

audit_findings.remediation: Encrypt or don't accept via HTTP

audit_findings.finding: Chrome UA spoofing for search scraping
Bare Exception catch swallows real errors
